name: Rick
subject: Final Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our American Revival
body:
_****_
****
****
[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
_**
**_
Peter,

This is your last chance to become a Charter Member in May. Your contribution before midnight will go a long way in helping us to fight for conservative reforms.
**Blue Membership:[Contribute: $25 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Red Membership: [Contribute $75 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)
White Membership: [Contribute $150 or more](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)**
It is essential we reach our monthly goal in order to carry out the activities needed to be successful. We believe the government closest to the people is the most responsive and accountable to the people. And, we fight every day to make this a reality.

[**Will you stand with us - become a Charter Member before midnight. **](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

Thanks,

Rick Wiley
Our American Revival

__
__
______

[](http://links.targetedvictory.mkt5241.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI3NDcwMDUS1&r=MTA2MTAzNzc5ODA4S0&b=0&j=NTgwMDEzMDg3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

**

****
**

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: I'm Running For President
body:
I'm Running For President. Be A Day One Supporter. | |

---
---
|
Dear Friend,

Just moments ago I officially announced that I am running for the Republican nomination for President of the United States.

**Will you stand with me today as a DAY ONE Founding Member of my campaign?[Please follow this link to make an instant online contribution](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131644:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)**.

I did not make this decision lightly. After months of consideration and years of working to protect and secure our country, I knew I could still do more.

**Our country very much needs a proven leader...**
* Who is ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One and has the conviction to defeat our enemies...
* Who can inspire Americans to build on the best our country has to offer...
* And who can cast a vision for a strong, secure and prosperous nation that Americans can rally around and give their full support.

**The greatest issue America faces is the growing threat to our nation's security from terrorist organizations with more capabilities, more arms, more recruits and more safe havens to attack the U.S. than at any time before 9/11.**

I recently retired as a Colonel from the U.S. Air Force Reserves after a 33-year career in the Air Force, National Guard and Reserves. I've visited and served in Afghanistan and the Middle East more than 20 times gaining first-hand knowledge about terror groups that threaten our way of life.

**Friend, I have the understanding, experience and leadership that is needed to protect this country. If you agree that we need an experienced leader in the White House, then I hope you will stand with me today by making a Day One supporter donation.**

**[Please click on one of the instant donate buttons below to make a Day One donation.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131644:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)**

| [** $5 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131645:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r) | [** $10 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131646:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)
---|---
[** $25 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131647:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r) | [** $50 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131648:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)
[** $75 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131649:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r) | [** $100 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131650:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)
[** $250 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131651:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r) | [** $500 Day One Supporter >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131652:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)

I'm running for President to do the big things. I believe in the near future our great country is going to face tremendous challenges - both at home and abroad - and we are going to need proven leadership to meet those challenges.

I have a proven conservative record of getting things done and bringing common-sense solutions to the table. I've been in the middle of debates, confrontations and decision-making on the critical issues - taxes, job creation, debt, Social Security, energy, military spending and foreign policy.

More than anything, our nation needs a president who will make the tough decisions needed to keep us safe and carry on the great promise of America.

**I am hoping that today I can count on you to[become a Day One Founding Member of my presidential campaign](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131644:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)**.

The road ahead will not be easy, but I take comfort knowing I have your friendship and support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. I am 100% committed to becoming the Republican nominee for president and going one-on-one against Hillary Clinton next year. I promise a hard-hitting, honest and winning fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. **[Please send whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131644:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28131644:27033957835:m:1:877327319:14E025F5F5636FA8B8BEDB3BF9975DEA:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information
[click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWcMAMc1Ne).

name: Rand Paul
subject: My next move
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

Two weeks ago no one thought you and I would be here today.

In a rare Sunday session last night, I stood up to President Obama on the U.S. Senate floor and forced the NSA's illegal spying program to expire.

Thanks to your efforts, starting last night at midnight, our government can no longer legally collect the phone records of American citizens.

But this fight is not over. Spy-state apologists are doing everything possible to shut down all debate and stop any and all true reforms.

With your help, I'm going to do everything possible to ensure you and I restore as much of the Fourth Amendment's protections on Americans' privacy as possible.

But I'm counting on your continued support. **[So will you stand with me by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 to help me rally even more Americans to this fight](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**?

The Senate will move to take up the House-passed "USA Freedom Act" today.

But this Obama-backed "reform" bill doesn't actually solve the problem long term.

It places the burden of spying on phone companies, and it doesn't fully protect our Fourth Amendment freedoms.

_I'm also afraid it will allow general warrants to continue_.

I've offered multiple amendments to the bill that are designed to protect the Fourth Amendment and the Bill of Rights, including:

*** STOPPING all federally mandated bulk collection of data on the American people;

*** PROHIBITING granting immunity to third party companies that break user agreements;

*** BLOCKING evidence obtained from warrantless spying to be used against Americans in criminal cases not related to terrorism or espionage;

*** CREATING a constitutional advocate to argue before the FISA court to prevent national security letters to be authored free of due process;

*** STOPPING the use of "sneak and peek" searches whereby the government searches your property - even in non-terrorism cases - without a warrant or without even informing you; and

*** DISCONTINUING warrantless spying on Americans created by executive order.

The government MUST obtain a warrant to collect your phone records. With your continued support, I will fight hard to ensure my amendments are considered.

After all, as you and I have seen, the surveillance-state apologists want ZERO debate.

Instead, they're going to do everything they can to stop you and me from ensuring their proposed reforms have real teeth.

**[That's why I'm counting on you to please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**.

The question I have for my colleagues in the U.S. Senate is . . .

Will they stand with President Obama - or will they stand with me and the American people?

I know where I stand.

It's the same place I've been standing for several years now. **[Will you chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**?

After you chip in, please call your U.S. Senators and urge them to stand with me and defend the Fourth Amendment. You can reach your Senators at **(202) 224-3121**.

Two years ago I sued the NSA over illegal spying. I've proposed the Fourth Amendment Protection Act. And I've been seeking for months to have a full, open and honest debate on this issue.

That debate never came.

I believe the American people deserve better.

_The callous use of general warrants and the disregard for the Bill of Rights must end_.

Forcing us to choose between our rights and our safety is a false choice and we are better than that as a nation and as a people.

Our Founders would be aghast.

They despised the idea of general warrants - warrants without a specific name, that didn't have any suggestion of suspicion, and weren't signed by an independent judge.

But Barack Obama's spy-state apologists over at the NSA believe a warrant with "Verizon" written on it is good enough to allow them to spy on every Verizon customer.

Our Founders fought a revolution over this. And today my colleagues refuse to even debate it.

I am ready and willing to start the debate on how we fight terrorism without giving up our liberty.

**[That's why I pledge to continue to stand and fight any Obama-backed"reform" bill that continues an illegal program](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**.

I will do everything I can to get a vote on my amendments designed to protect the Fourth Amendment.

But I really need you to continue standing with me.

**[Will you chip in a contribution to help me fight back against Barack Obama and defend the Fourth Amendment](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**?

The fact that you and I are right here today is proof that if enough freedom-loving Americans rally together and fight for our liberties - we can defeat the Washington Machine.

As I continue to lead the fight against President Obama over the NSA's domestic spying, I need to count on your support.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)**.

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138774:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138775:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138776:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28138777:27040654688:m:1:879035888:E7669951F08E2C37B1134AF1FA62AF4C:r) Paid for by Rand Paul for President
---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: FWD: I'm Running For President
body:
I'm Running For President. Be A Day One Supporter. Friend,

Just a few hours ago, I stood on Main Street in Central, South Carolina and watched Lindsey Graham announce his campaign for President.

**[Will you stand with him today as a Day One Founding Member of our team?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28139010:27041005681:m:1:877327319:0631788741F7D8620A3A078B6024969B:r)**

After Barack Obama's failed presidency, our country is in desperate need of a proven, experienced leader to secure America and get us back on track. >From his 33 years in the military to his leadership on national security issues, Lindsey Graham has proven he knows how to correct President Obama's foreign policy blunders and keep America secure.

**We need your support TODAY.** **[Please become a DAY ONE Founding Member by making an instant online contribution.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28139010:27041005681:m:1:877327319:0631788741F7D8620A3A078B6024969B:r)**

**This campaign is certainly not going to be easy. The people who are chomping at the bit to see us fail are those who do not have the courage and will to fight our enemies and win, which is why your DAY ONE support is critical. Your donation today will send a strong message of the strength our campaign has.**

No matter the amount, your donation will make a huge impact. **[Please donate whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28139010:27041005681:m:1:877327319:0631788741F7D8620A3A078B6024969B:r)**.

Thank you for your support and for being a part of this great team.

Sincerely,

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager

* * *
| |

I promise a hard-hitting, honest and winning fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. **[Please send whatever you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28139010:27041005681:m:1:877327319:0631788741F7D8620A3A078B6024969B:r)**. Thanks, Lindsey

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/28139010:27041005681:m:1:877327319:0631788741F7D8620A3A078B6024969B:r)

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

clean_body: I'm Running For President. Be A Day One Supporter. Friend, Just a few hours ago, I stood on Main Street in Central, South Carolina and watched Lindsey Graham announce his campaign for President. After Barack Obama's failed presidency, our country is in desperate need of a proven, experienced leader to secure America and get us back on track. >From his 33 years in the military to his leadership on national security issues, Lindsey Graham has proven he knows how to correct President Obama's foreign policy blunders and keep America secure. We need your support TODAY. This campaign is certainly not going to be easy. The people who are chomping at the bit to see us fail are those who do not have the courage and will to fight our enemies and win, which is why your DAY ONE support is critical. Your donation today will send a strong message of the strength our campaign has. No matter the amount, your donation will make a huge impact. . Thank you for your support and for being a part of this great team. Sincerely, Christian Ferry Campaign Manager | | | Dear Friend, Just moments ago I officially announced that I am running for the Republican nomination for President of the United States. Will you stand with me today as a DAY ONE Founding Member of my campaign?. I did not make this decision lightly. After months of consideration and years of working to protect and secure our country, I knew I could still do more. Our country very much needs a proven leader... Who is ready to be Commander in Chief on Day One and has the conviction to defeat our enemies... Who can inspire Americans to build on the best our country has to offer... And who can cast a vision for a strong, secure and prosperous nation that Americans can rally around and give their full support. The greatest issue America faces is the growing threat to our nation's security from terrorist organizations with more capabilities, more arms, more recruits and more safe havens to attack the U.S. than at any time before 9/11. I recently retired as a Colonel from the U.S. Air Force Reserves after a 33-year career in the Air Force, National Guard and Reserves. I've visited and served in Afghanistan and the Middle East more than 20 times gaining first-hand knowledge about terror groups that threaten our way of life. Friend, I have the understanding, experience and leadership that is needed to protect this country. If you agree that we need an experienced leader in the White House, then I hope you will stand with me today by making a Day One supporter donation. | | ---|--- | | | I'm running for President to do the big things. I believe in the near future our great country is going to face tremendous challenges - both at home and abroad - and we are going to need proven leadership to meet those challenges. I have a proven conservative record of getting things done and bringing common-sense solutions to the table. I've been in the middle of debates, confrontations and decision-making on the critical issues - taxes, job creation, debt, Social Security, energy, military spending and foreign policy. More than anything, our nation needs a president who will make the tough decisions needed to keep us safe and carry on the great promise of America. I am hoping that today I can count on you to. The road ahead will not be easy, but I take comfort knowing I have your friendship and support. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham P.S. I am 100% committed to becoming the Republican nominee for president and going one-on-one against Hillary Clinton next year. I promise a hard-hitting, honest and winning fight, but I need your immediate help to ensure we have the funds needed to do so. . Thanks, Lindsey | Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system April 14, 2015. For more information . |
